title: Spontex 19700167 Scrub & Wipe Multipurpose Cleaning Pad, Blue, grey (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
VERSATILE: With 2 different sides and an absorbent sponge centre this pad is perfect for a variety of tasks all around the house.
REMOVES 99% OF BACTERIA. Efficient with just water, the blue microfibre side removes dirt, grease and 99% of bacteria with ease.
ECOLOGICAL: The microfibre side is efficient with just water, so there is no need for chemicals!
NON-SCRATCH. The grey scrubbing side removes stubborn marks and stains without scratching.
MACHINE WASHABLE. The pad can be placed in the washing machine at 40°C.
description: From the manufacturer Spontex Scrub & Wipe Multipurpose Cleaning Pad Spontex Scrub & Wipe Cleaning Pad is a multipurpose pad which thanks to its two different sides and absorbent sponge centre is super efficient and effectively removes dirt and marks. This specially designed pad has a grey scrubbing side to remove stubborn marks and stains without scratching and a blue microfibre side to remove dirt and grease with ease. Ideal for a whole host of cleaning tasks, it’s great for washing up and wiping down all around the house, especially in kitchens and bathrooms. Spontex make cleaning Better, Quicker and Easier Spontex are proud to call themselves the champion of less effort! They’ve dedicated over 80 years to creating products that make housework less time consuming, easier to get done and whenever possible, a bit more fun! Choose any of their high quality cloths, sponges, scourers, gloves, mops or brooms and you can be sure that they’ve used their know how to add an extra trick to make household tasks better, quicker and easier.
